message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title PB-158 UC8 SQD: Get campaigns customer is eligible for

note over "P&O\n(Core Next)", "P&O DB"
**Abstract:**
This use cases describes the changes being made to an existing endpoint.
The endpoint will be modified so that it can be called by the user and
will return a list of campaigns that the customer is eligible for. A campaign
logo version number will be returned, as well as a campaign logo
image (if requested).
end note

actor "Next Customer" as customer
box "Next Platform" #LightGray
participant "P&O\n(Core Next)" as PO
database "P&O DB" as PODB
end box
participant "Core Bradesco" as CB

note left of customer
**Endpoint:**
GET /campaigns

**Current implementation:**
Currently only called by system management, returns a list of all campaigns
with the option to specify:
• NAME
• PARTNER_ID
• OFFER_ID

**Required implementation:**
*Either through extension of existing API or new,* enable the user
to call the endpoint. When a user calls the endpoint return a list of campaigns
that that the user is eligible for. As part of the request, include an optional
field for whether or not to return the offer logo.

As part of the CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL response include:
• Campaign logo version number
• Campaign logo (optional)

**ENSURE BACKWARDS COMPATIBILITY IS MAINTAINED**
end note

customer -> PO : 1 Get campaigns user is eligible for ({NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}, {INCLUDE_LOGO})

box "filter on {NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}" #White
PO -> PODB : 2 Get campaigns user is eligible for ({NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}, {INCLUDE_LOGO})

note right of PODB
**Note:**
Read P&O tables:
• ELLIGIBLE_USER
• CAMPAIGN
end note

PODB --> PO : 3 Read campaigns user is eligible for
end box

PO --> PO : 4 Return campaigns user is eligible for (CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL)

alt if user has been or is eligible for at least one campaign
PO --> customer : 5 Return campaigns user is eligible for (CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL)
else if user is not eligible for any active campaigns
PO --> customer : 6 Return error (MESSAGE)
end

@enduml
```
